attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; utilized as a powerful chase engine and leadout asset for teammates, deployed in transitional phases rather than finale sprints.
team_tactics: NTT employs him as early-stage chase power to control breakaways and set up other finishers, though timing coordination appears problematic with premature deployment.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling stages where sustained power output can control pace; struggles when efforts extend into technical finales requiring explosive acceleration.
vulnerability: Exposed when deployed too early in chase scenarios, leaving him exhausted before critical finale moments; timing coordination with team strategy appears inconsistent.
key_patterns: Used as chase workhorse to control breakaways for teammates rather than personal opportunities.
Premature deployment exhausts his considerable power before reaching optimal finish positioning.
Functions as transitional domestique rather than protected sprinter despite powerful engine.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows strong raw power but poor tactical deployment prevents assessment of true finishing capability
